zh.Suffolk, County Antrim, Northern Ireland: 英國北愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆素福爾可
zh.lifeSummary: Margery Tye是Sir Robert Tye of Barsham的女兒，於1325年出生在英國北愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆素福爾可。她於1342年與Sir John de Braham在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

en.Suffolk, County Antrim, Northern Ireland: Suffolk, County Antrim, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Tye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Kent): from Middle English tye, teghe, teye ‘enclosed piece of land; large area of common pasture’ (Old English tēag, tīege). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived on or near such a piece of land, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Teigh (Rutland) or Great, Little, and Marks Tey (Essex).
North German: from a short form, Tide, of the personal name Dietrich .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, probably representing its Teochew, Hokkien, or Taiwanese pronunciation. See   Zheng   1.

variants.name: Tee
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, see   Zheng   1.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 池, possibly based on its Hokkien or Teochew pronunciation, see   Chi   1.

variants.name: Tyer
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a common pasture, from Middle English tye ‘enclosed piece of land; large area of common pasture’ (see Tye ) + -er.
English: occupational name for a maker of chests, from an unrecorded Middle English teyer, tyer, an agent derivative of the word in 1 above, which also had the sense ‘box, coffer, chest’.

English: occasionally perhaps from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Tiard, Tiart with the loss of final -d or -t. It is an Old French form of ancient Germanic Theudhard, Latinized as Thiardus, and is composed of theud ‘people’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’.

variants.name: Dietrich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Gerhard, Dieter, Hans, Helmut, Juergen, Wolfgang, Fritz, Hans-Peter, Heinz, Jurgen.

German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Theodoric (see Terry ), composed of the elements theud ‘people, race’ + rīc ‘power(ful), rich’. This surname is also found in some other European countries, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland. Compare Dedrick , Deitrich , Detrick , and Tetrick .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: Margery Tye was born in 1325, in Suffolk, County Antrim, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Robert Tye of Barsham. She married Sir John de Braham in 1342, in Brome, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

de.lifeSummary: Margery Tye wurde 1325 in Suffolk, County Antrim, Nordirland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Sir Robert Tye of Barsham geboren. Sie hat 1342 in Brome, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Sir John de Braham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

ja.Suffolk, County Antrim, Northern Ireland: イギリス北アイルランドコウントイ アントリムスフォルク
ja.lifeSummary: Margery Tyeは1325年にイギリス北アイルランドコウントイ アントリムスフォルクでSir Robert Tye of Barshamの娘として生まれた。1342年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブロメでSir John de Brahamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Tye(은)는 1325년 영국 북아일랜드 카운티 앤트림 수폴크에서 Sir Robert Tye of Barsham의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브롬에서 Sir John de Braham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.Suffolk, County Antrim, Northern Ireland: суффолк, коунти антрим, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Margery Tye родилась в 1325 г. в местности суффолк, коунти антрим, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Sir Robert Tye of Barsham. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Braham в 1342 г. в местности бром, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.
